name: Baked Mussels
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub mussels with a brush and pull off beards.
2. Prepare a frying pan with a tight-fitting lid that will hold all the mussels.
3. Add 3-4 tablespoons olive oil, 1/3 cup water, salt, and pepper to the pan. Cover and let the mussels steam over medium heat until they open.
4. Meanwhile, combine bread crumbs, grated cheese, and garlic cloves for stuffing.
5. Remove mussels to cool and reserve the liquid.
6. Do not use unopened mussels.
7. Remove mussels and lay the shells flat without breaking them apart.
8. Place one mussel in each shell, cover with prepared stuffing.
9. Squeeze 1 tablespoon crushed tomatoes on each mussel.
10. Sprinkle with chopped parsley.
11. Drizzle with olive oil and remaining liquid from the steam process to moisten bread crumbs.
12. Bake at 375°F until golden brown, about 15-20 minutes.
13. Serve hot.
